channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: The Galaxy S26 Ultra proves Samsung is evolving, and its direction makes a lot of sense in the AI age
item.description: Samsung may not be pushing the envelope for specs anymore, but that's not stopping the Galaxy S26 Ultra from being a great phone.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: A vibrant wallpaper on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: A vibrant wallpaper on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: A vibrant wallpaper on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: This feature on the Xiaomi 17 Ultra convinced me to use the phone as my daily driver
item.description: Xiaomi has the best Reading Mode of any manufacturer, and using it on the Xiaomi 17 Ultra has been a revelation.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Reading mode on the Xiaomi 17 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Reading mode on the Xiaomi 17 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Reading mode on the Xiaomi 17 Ultra

item.title: Tracfone now offers 5G Home Internet for as little as $39/month — here's the deal
item.description: Tracfone has been providing users with affordable wireless for over two decades, and now it's entering the 5G internet arena.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Tracfone logo with Android Central mascot
media:content.media:text: Tracfone logo with Android Central mascot
media:content.media:title: Tracfone logo with Android Central mascot

item.title: Less fatigue: Boox launches thin Go 10.3 (Gen 2) E-Ink tablet that's easy on the reading eyes
item.description: Boox announced the arrival of the Go 10.3 (Gen 2) E-Ink tablet, which is a massive boon to users looking to read and work.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Boox Go 10.3 (Gen 2) tablet set against a wall, displaying a user's work document/notes.
media:content.media:text: The Boox Go 10.3 (Gen 2) tablet set against a wall, displaying a user's work document/notes.
media:content.media:title: The Boox Go 10.3 (Gen 2) tablet set against a wall, displaying a user's work document/notes.

item.title: The Galaxy S26 Ultra may be dominating the airwaves, but its biggest competitor is $400 cheaper for a limited time
item.description: The Google Pixel 10 Pro XL is the Galaxy S26 Ultra's biggest rival, and it's selling for $899 unlocked at Best Buy's TechFest.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Holding a white Google Pixel 10 Pro XL in front of red flowers
media:content.media:text: Holding a white Google Pixel 10 Pro XL in front of red flowers
media:content.media:title: Holding a white Google Pixel 10 Pro XL in front of red flowers

item.title: Spotify on Wear OS just got a big redesign that makes it much easier to use
item.description: Spotify's Wear OS app now offers a more intuitive interface for playback and browsing.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Spotify logo on an Android phone
media:content.media:text: Spotify logo on an Android phone
media:content.media:title: Spotify logo on an Android phone

item.title: Personal Intelligence for the masses: Google rolls it out in AI Mode and more across the U.S.
item.description: Google's Personal Intelligence rolls out to all free-tier U.S. users for AI assistance in AI Mode, the Gemini app, and more.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Gemini Personal Intelligence feature on an Android phone.
media:content.media:text: The Gemini Personal Intelligence feature on an Android phone.
media:content.media:title: The Gemini Personal Intelligence feature on an Android phone.

item.title: This is the POCO X8 Pro Iron Man Edition
item.description: POCO just released the X8 Pro Iron Man Edition, and I used the phone ahead of launch to see if it's as good as last year's model.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: POCO X8 Pro Iron Man Edition review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: POCO X8 Pro Iron Man Edition review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: POCO X8 Pro Iron Man Edition review on Android Central

item.title: I used OPPO's Find N6 for two weeks — this creaseless foldable is on another level entirely, and it is the ideal upgrade to the Galaxy Z Fold 7
item.description: With a fully creaseless panel, the OPPO Find N6 is the next evolution in foldable tech.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: OPPO Find N6 review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: OPPO Find N6 review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: OPPO Find N6 review on Android Central

item.title: All to your liking: Spotify's 'Taste Profile' beta puts you in charge of the music you find
item.description: Your musical tastes can change, and Spotify is giving you the keys to drive that ship wherever it might lead you with this beta.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Spotify's Taste Profile beta begins soon in New Zealand.
media:content.media:text: Spotify's Taste Profile beta begins soon in New Zealand.
media:content.media:title: Spotify's Taste Profile beta begins soon in New Zealand.

item.title: The more I use the Tecno Camon 50 Ultra, the more it feels like an affordable Galaxy S26 Ultra
item.description: Tenco's latest Camon 50 Ultra focuses on performance and AI, offering tons of features and a solid software experience for less than a typical flagship.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Camon 50 Ultra on a wall
media:content.media:text: Camon 50 Ultra on a wall
media:content.media:title: Camon 50 Ultra on a wall

item.title: Google is making Chrome on Android tablets and foldables feel more like desktop with the new update
item.description: The update introduces a bookmarks bar below the address bar for easier navigation.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Google Chrome for Android app icon on a smartphone
media:content.media:text: Google Chrome for Android app icon on a smartphone
media:content.media:title: Google Chrome for Android app icon on a smartphone

item.title: These three features make the Shargeek 300 the definitive 24,000mAh power bank — it's so good I retired my UGREEN power bank
item.description: Sharge has a new power bank, and it is a beast. The Shargeek 300 has a 24,000mAh battery, two USB-C ports that go up to 140W, and RGB lighting. The best part? Both ports hit 140W simultaneously, allowing you to charge two notebooks at the same time.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Shargeek 300 review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Shargeek 300 review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Shargeek 300 review on Android Central

item.title: Google I/O
item.description: Everything you need to know about Google I/O 2026 is here!
item.author: shruti.shekar@futurenet.com (Shruti Shekar)
item.dc:creator: Shruti Shekar

media:content.media:description: Google I/O 2026
media:content.media:text: Google I/O 2026
media:content.media:title: Google I/O 2026

item.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra display review: Privacy at the cost of everything else
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra comes with one of the most unique smartphone displays we've ever seen, but that also comes with unique problems.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra's home screen with custom wallpaper from the Backdrops app
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra's home screen with custom wallpaper from the Backdrops app
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra's home screen with custom wallpaper from the Backdrops app

item.title: Amazon just announced another Prime Day, and it starts next week — FAQ, early deals, and everything you need to know about the Big Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale event returns on March 25th. Here's what you need to know.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Amazon boxes with assorted devices
media:content.media:text: Amazon boxes with assorted devices
media:content.media:title: Amazon boxes with assorted devices

item.title: RedMagic 11 Air Trace Edition is the same great gaming phone in a louder shirt
item.description: RedMagic’s 11 Air Trace Edition keeps its slim design, Snapdragon 8 Elite power, and huge 7,000mAh battery, with a flashier white-and-orange look.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: RedMagic 11 Air Trace Edition back
media:content.media:text: RedMagic 11 Air Trace Edition back
media:content.media:title: RedMagic 11 Air Trace Edition back

item.title: Samsung apparently started One UI 9 tests, and I'm crying in my lack of One UI 8.5
item.description: Samsung has allegedly started testing its Android 7-based OS, One UI 9, ahead of its Galaxy users receiving One UI 8.5.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Android 17 logo on a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:text: The Android 17 logo on a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:title: The Android 17 logo on a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra

item.title: 'Wide' Galaxy Z Fold inbound, and these alleged specs have us curious
item.description: Could this be what a "Wide" Galaxy Z Fold offers consumers? This rumor says so, but there's still time left.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 review
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 review
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 review

item.title: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 could get a bigger battery, and I’m wondering why Samsung waited this long
item.description: After five years stuck at 4,400mAh, Samsung might finally give the Galaxy Z Fold 8 a 5,000mAh battery.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: Mint Mobile just quietly dropped one of the best Galaxy S26 deals I've seen yet — over 40% off the phone, heavily discounted wireless
item.description: Mint Mobile finally got the Galaxy S26 series in stock, and its deal on the phones is truly remarkable.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

item.title: Samsung might already be done selling the Galaxy Z TriFold — and you shouldn't be surprised
item.description: Samsung may stop selling the Galaxy Z TriFold in Korea and other regions just months after launch.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold hands-on testing at Dubai Mall on Android Central

item.title: The Fairphone 6 is getting Android 16 earlier than expected
item.description: Fairphone is rolling out Android 16 to the Fairphone 6 today, bringing smarter notifications, stronger scam protections, and handy upgrades.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: Samsung reportedly in crisis mode despite encouraging Galaxy S26 sales
item.description: Samsung is reportedly entering emergency management despite strong Galaxy S26 preorders.

media:content.media:description: Samsung logo on the Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: I test wireless earbuds for a living, and the Galaxy Buds 4 Pro are hard to beat, especially if you own a Samsung phone
item.description: More than an iterative upgrade, Samsung's Galaxy Buds 4 Pro have made appreciable improvements in audio quality, ANC strength, and durability
item.author: klpmediallc@gmail.com (Tshaka Armstrong)
item.dc:creator: Tshaka Armstrong

media:content.media:description: Galaxy Buds4 Pro on a desk, next to a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Galaxy Buds4 Pro on a desk, next to a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Galaxy Buds4 Pro on a desk, next to a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra

item.title: This forgotten Pixel 10 feature just made my life a little bit easier — Here's how to use it
item.description: Google never really did away with the Rules feature, but it's become smarter on the Pixel 10. You can use it to create automations on your phone.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Rules automation feature on Android 16 on Google Pixel
media:content.media:text: Rules automation feature on Android 16 on Google Pixel
media:content.media:title: Rules automation feature on Android 16 on Google Pixel

item.title: The Magic 8 Pro Air proves that Apple and Samsung got their thin phones wrong
item.description: The Honor Magic 8 Pro Air proves that thin phones can be true flagships, but Apple, Samsung, and Huawei may have taken the wrong approach.
item.author: nirave@hot.tech (Nirave Gondhia)
item.dc:creator: Nirave Gondhia

media:content.media:description: Back on the Honor Magic 8 Pro Air in orange in the hand

item.title: Now that the Galaxy S26 series has landed, what's your favorite new feature?
item.description: In our latest poll, we want to know what Galaxy S26 feature you're most impressed with, from Privacy Display to Gemini screen automation.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

item.title: This game-changing Galaxy S26 feature just transformed my Netflix binge sessions
item.description: Samsung's Audio Eraser has been upgraded to support third-party apps, lowering background noise and ensuring voices are clear.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Audio Eraser on the Galaxy S26 Plus

media:content.media:title: Audio Eraser on the Galaxy S26 Plus

item.title: This Galaxy S26 feature is so powerful I might skip carrying a laptop
item.description: Samsung DeX on the Galaxy S26 adds powerful multitasking, allowing up to 20 apps across multiple windows for a true desktop-like experience.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

item.title: The Pixel 10 Pro finally solved my biggest privacy concern with this one feature

item.title: Instagram says your chat privacy is going away, as its encryption vanishes soon
item.description: Instagram confirmed that it will no longer protect user chats with a strong encryption layer, leaving their privacy exposed.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Instagram logo on a phone screen
media:content.media:text: Instagram logo on a phone screen
media:content.media:title: Instagram logo on a phone screen

item.title: Motorola Razr Fold vs. Razr Ultra 2025: Depends on your folding preference
item.description: The Motorola Razr Fold marks the company's debut into book-style folding phones. But the Razr Ultra 2025 is now a better value-flagship offering after the price cut.
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Fold hands-on testing

item.title: You can now buy the Nothing Headphone (a) and its massive five-day battery
item.description: Nothing’s $199 Headphone (a) is now on sale with bold colors, adaptive ANC, hi-res audio, and a massive 135-hour battery claim.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: 'Verts on Disney Plus' want you swiping all day to find the next big thing to watch
item.description: Disney Plus announced "Verts," its solution to driving more user engagement with short-form videos about shows and movies, with more to come.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Disney Plus launches 'Verts,' a series of short-form content videos covering the movies and shows the platform provides.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra teardown reveals the clever camera tech Unpacked skipped
item.description: A teardown shows the Galaxy S26 Ultra packs smarter hardware upgrades, including a brighter zoom camera, larger cooling system, and improved S Pen protection.

item.title: I’ve spent years forgetting to turn off my phone's focus modes, but One UI 8.5 finally fixes that
item.description: One UI 8.5 finally lets you set expiration dates on Samsung routines, so temporary automations actually know when to quit.

item.title: 100x zoom on the Pixel 10 Pro has a new name — and it makes me wonder why it wasn't always this
item.description: "Pro Zoom" is what it should've been called from day one.

item.title: With the Deco BE65 Pro, I finally found a mesh Wi-Fi 7 router that I like
item.description: TP-Link's Deco BE65 Pro is a Wi-Fi 7 mesh router system that's actually great to use. With extensive configurability and an elegant design, this is a good upgrade if you want a new router.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: TP-Link Deco BE65 Pro review on Android Central

media:content.media:title: TP-Link Deco BE65 Pro review on Android Central

item.title: Holy crap! The Galaxy S26 Ultra just ordered dinner and tea for me and all I had to do was hit 'Confirm'
item.description: Automation just hit the next level with Gemini and the Galaxy S26 Ultra, and now you can ask it to order your next meal, tea, Uber, and soon even groceries.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Asking Gemini to order a tea from Starbucks for me on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: Google just gave Gemini the power to control apps on the Galaxy S26 — and it's pretty wild

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra vs. Xiaomi 17 Ultra: Brand perception is everything
item.description: The Galaxy S26 Ultra is a productivity powerhouse but there's no ignoring the Xiaomi 17 Ultra's incredible cameras and battery life. Which $1,000+ phone should you bet on?
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

item.title: This is the best spy game I've played since GoldenEye 007, and everyone is sleeping on it
item.description: Unseen Diplomacy 2 is the most unique and probably full-fledged spy game I've ever played, and its $16 price tag makes it even more attractive.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Trying to grab a fake diamond between a grid of lasers in Unseen Diplomacy 2 on Meta Quest 3
media:content.media:text: Trying to grab a fake diamond between a grid of lasers in Unseen Diplomacy 2 on Meta Quest 3
media:content.media:title: Trying to grab a fake diamond between a grid of lasers in Unseen Diplomacy 2 on Meta Quest 3
